channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Tesla stock plummets, but its sky-high valuation persists. Here’s why
item.description: Tesla’s stock has dropped by nearly half in three months. Even so, investors are still debating whether Elon Musk’s electric-vehicle maker remains overpriced.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Elon Musk claims X being targeted in 'massive cyberattack' as service goes down
item.description: Hours after a series of outages Monday that left X unavailable to thousands of users, Elon Musk claimed that the social media platform was being targeted in a “massive cyberattack.” “We get attacked every day, but this was done with a lot of resources," Musk claimed in a post.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE CHAPMAN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: How farmers are using AI on vineyards to make wine
item.description: When artificial intelligence-backed tractors became available to vineyards, Tom Gamble wanted to be an early adopter. He knew there would be a learning curve, but Gamble decided the technology was worth figuring out. The third-generation farmer bought one autonomous tractor.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Army's New Approach to Developing Next-Gen Command and Control Systems
item.description: The Army is taking a different approach to developing its next-generation command and control systems, focusing on the end result rather than the map for getting there.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: AI made its way to vineyards. Here’s how the technology is helping make your wine
item.description: Experts say that the wine industry is proof that businesses can integrate the technology efficiently.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Tesla shares plummet as Wall Street rethinks sales projections
item.description: Tesla Inc. shares are on track for their steepest drop since 2020 as Wall Street analysts begin to slash their estimates for vehicle deliveries.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: OPM inspector general investigating DOGE emails, access to agency data
item.description: The inspector general for the Office of Personnel Management (OPM) told lawmakers he is investigating the use of a new data system at the agency that has been part of a broader effort by Elon Musk and his allies to email federal workers.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, The Hill

item.title: Another top security camera maker is seeing devices hijacked into botnet
item.description: Edimax IC-7100 camera was found vulnerable to a command injection flaw currently being used in remote code execution attacks.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: X outage affects thousands of users
item.description: An outage on the social platform X appeared to impact thousands of users on Monday morning. According to outage-tracking website Downdetector.com, more than 37,000 users reported problems with the platform shortly before 10 a.m. EDT on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Worried about DeepSeek? Well, Google Gemini collects even more of your personal data
item.description: Aggressive data collection and sharing practices – beware of the hidden privacy price tag when using AI chatbot apps. Here's all you need to know.
item.dc:creator: chiara.castro@futurenet.com (Chiara Castro), TechRadar

item.title: The new Ray-Ban Meta smart glasses design is an expensive disappointment
item.description: Ray-Ban and Meta partner with fashion brand Coperni to create a design that’s more boring and expensive than I expected.
item.dc:creator: hamish.hector@futurenet.com (Hamish Hector), TechRadar

item.title: Nvidia GTC 2025: What to expect from the AI leader
item.description: No company has both driven and benefited from AI advancements more than Nvidia. Last year, Nvidia’s GTC 2024 grabbed headlines with its introduction of the Blackwell architecture and the DGX systems powered by it. With GTC 2025 right around the corner (it runs March 17- 21 in San Jose, Calif.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Mecalux integra la IA generativa en su ‘software’ de gestión de almacenes
item.description: Mecalux Sostware Solutions da un paso adelante en su estrategia de transformación digital al integrar la inteligencia artificial (IA) generativa en su software de gestión de almacenes Easy WMS con el propósito de responder a peticiones empleando el lenguaje natural.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: YouTube is cracking down on gambling content. Here’s what’s changing
item.description: YouTube is taking steps to crack down on gambling content. On Tuesday, the platform announced a new policy that bans creators from directing viewers to “unapproved” gambling websites through links, images, text, logos, or verbal mentions.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Two Bay Area counties lead the state in electric vehicle sales
item.description: Santa Clara and Marin counties held their position among leaders in zero-emission vehicle sales across California in 2024, according to new state data.
item.dc:creator: Adrian Rodriguez, The Mercury News

item.title: Duckduckgo launches its version of an AI search assistant
item.description: After nearly two years of intensive beta testing, Duckduckgo has launched the live version of the AI assistant previously known as Duck Assist. Similar to Google’s AI Overviews, the AI Assistant can provide quick answers to users’ questions, such as why Pluto is no longer classified as a planet.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: JavaScript tools and frameworks we’re watching now
item.description: JavaScript is moving in two directions at once, favoring both comprehensive, full-stack frameworks and greater simplicity. Sometimes these trends are harmonious, and at other times they are at odds. The drive for frameworks and libraries that abstract away complexity is a key point of tension.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Siemens announces $285 million investment in US manufacturing
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Siemens plans to invest $285 million in manufacturing in the United States, the tech company said Thursday, including two new facilities in California and Texas. The U.S. is the largest market for the company. The recent investments in the Siemens' U.S.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Achieving unified visibility for effective zero trust implementation
item.description: All components of a zero trust architecture must generate data that is observable, available and able to be correlated within a unified data plane. The post Achieving unified visibility for effective zero trust implementation first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Democrats ask for investigation into whether Musk is using government position to influence X advertisers
item.description: Democratic senators are asking the Department of Justice (DOJ) to investigate whether tech billionaire Elon Musk, a senior adviser to President Trump, is leveraging his government position to pressure advertisers into spending more on his social media platform, X.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, The Hill

item.title: New Google feature flags when you might be getting scammed in real time
item.description: The two features each work to identify and warn you of a possible scam while it's unfolding, either over text or on a phone call.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, NewsNation

item.title: How to handle type erasure in advanced Java generics
item.description: Generics programming in Java enhances type safety and code reusability by allowing developers to define classes and methods using type parameters.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: C++ founder champions profiles for memory safety
item.description: C++ memory safety issues have come under heat recently, with rising interest in projects like TrapC and Safe C++ that attempt to tackle the issue. But C++ designer Bjarne Stroustrup remains steadfast in promoting profiles as essential for safety in C++.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 1 click cost a father $4 million in bitcoin to vishing scammers
item.description: A man invested $4 million in bitcoin and lost it all with a single click when he was targeted by a vishing scam, which uses phone calls to trick people.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Judge denies Elon Musk's request to block OpenAI for-profit conversion but welcomes trial
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — A federal judge has denied Elon Musk's request for a court order blocking OpenAI from converting itself to a for-profit company but said she could expedite a trial to consider Musk's claims against the ChatGPT maker and its CEO. U.S.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: UK watchdog drops competition review of Microsoft's OpenAI deal
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Britain's competition watchdog said Wednesday it has dropped its review of Microsoft's partnership with OpenAI, saying it's satisfied that the deal doesn't need a closer investigation under the country's merger rules.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Salesforce’s Agentforce 2dx update aims to simplify AI agent development, deployment
item.description: Salesforce on Wednesday released the third version of its agentic AI offering — Agentforce 2dx — to simplify the development, testing, and deployment of AI agents that can automate business processes across departments, such as sales, service, marketing, finance, HR, and operations.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: AI pioneers who channeled 'hedonistic' machines win computer science's top prize
item.description: Teaching machines in the way that animal trainers mold the behavior of dogs or horses has been an important method for developing artificial intelligence and one that was recognized Wednesday with the top computer science award.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian joins bid to acquire TikTok
item.description: Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian has joined billionaire Frank McCourt’s bid to acquire TikTok as a strategic adviser.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Georgia lawmakers push to ban automated speed cameras near schools
item.description: DECATUR, Ga. (AP) — Outside Beacon Hill Middle School in the Atlanta suburb of Decatur, like along hundreds of roadsides across Georgia, the unblinking eye of a camera tickets drivers who speed through a school zone.
item.dc:creator: JEFF AMY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: SolarWinds buys Squadcast to speed incident response
item.description: Observability provider SolarWinds announced this week it had signed an agreement to acquire San Francisco-based Squadcast and its incident response technology for an undisclosed amount.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Minnesota considers blocking 'nudify' apps that use AI to make explicit images without consent
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (AP) — Molly Kelley was stunned to discover in June that someone she knew had used widely available “nudification” technology to create highly realistic and sexually explicit videos and images of her, using family photos that were posted on social media.
item.dc:creator: STEVE KARNOWSKI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Authorities use high tech to enhance border security
item.description: Surveillance cameras and drones give border officials an advantage; but the challenge of data-sharing silos remains.
item.dc:creator: Ali Bradley, NewsNation

item.title: Startup Fractile tackles AI inference bottlenecks with new chip design
item.description: A 29-year-old entrepreneur with a Ph.D in robotics is looking to shake up the AI chip industry with an innovative approach that promises to deliver hardware that is 100 times faster, 10 times cheaper, and 20 times more energy efficient than the Nvidia GPUs that dominate the market today.
item.dc:creator: Network World
